patch.value: Calendar: pm cal <view> --date crashes (positional view + any flag)

Manual dogfood B1 (HIGH): pm cal day --date +7d, pm cal week --date 2026-05-28, pm cal agenda --date +7d all exited via extension_command_handler_failed:project:builtin-calendar:cal. Root cause in packages/pm-calendar/extensions/calendar/index.{ts,js}: the guard 'context.args.length > 1' counted loosely-parsed flag tokens (e.g. [day, --date, +7d]) as extra positional views and threw. Fixed by only treating the leading non-flag tokens as positionals. Either a positional view or --date alone already worked; the bug was the combination.
pm cal <view> --date <abs|relative> works for day/week/month/agenda; two positional views still rejected; regression tests added.

Fixed positional-view + --date crash in pm-calendar index.ts/js by only treating leading non-flag tokens as positionals; added regression tests (view+--date works for day/week/month/agenda; two positional views still rejected). Verified live in isolated sandbox and full suite.
